title: Logs falls back to agent log for unknown kinds
description: Black-box smoke for `orca logs <unknown-kind>` with a preseeded agent log.
input: Seed an agent log entry, run `orca logs nonsense`, and verify the command falls back to the agent log instead of erroring.
command:
bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_ROOT=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_ROOT" EXIT; mkdir -p "$TMP_ROOT/home/.orca/logs"; cat > "$TMP_ROOT/home/.orca/logs/agent.log" <<EOF
[INFO] fallback agent entry
EOF
env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home" ORCA_HOME="$TMP_ROOT/home/.orca" node dist/bin/orca.js logs nonsense'
